case_title: CORONA, GUILLERMO VS WESTERN WICKER IMPORTS R/O et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $975.85 FILED BY CORONA, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN WICKER IMPORTS R/O VERA, JESUS OMAR (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORONA, GUILLERMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN WICKER IMPORTS R/O VERA, JESUS OMAR (DRIVER) POS WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
